text:
<|system|>
You are a privacy-preserving intent extractor. Given personal device context (emails, notes, browsing), extract anonymous shopping intent keywords. Return only a JSON object with: intent (string), keywords (array), category (string), urgency (low/medium/high), budget_hint (string or null).<|end|>
<|user|>
Email: 'Hey can you pick up a good trail running shoe for our Yosemite trip next weekend? I was looking at Brooks Ghost or Hoka Speedgoat, budget around $150'. Note: 'need new running gear before July trip'<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "buy trail running shoes for upcoming hiking trip", "keywords": ["trail running shoes", "hiking footwear", "Brooks Ghost", "Hoka Speedgoat", "outdoor running"], "category": "Sports & Outdoors", "urgency": "high", "budget_hint": "$150"}<|end|>

<|system|>
You are a privacy-preserving intent extractor. Given personal device context (emails, notes, browsing), extract anonymous shopping intent keywords. Return only a JSON object with: intent (string), keywords (array), category (string), urgency (low/medium/high), budget_hint (string or null).<|end|>
<|user|>
Browsing history: espresso machines reddit, best home espresso 2024, breville barista express review. Note: 'save up for espresso machine, want to stop buying coffee every day'<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "purchase home espresso machine to replace daily coffee shop visits", "keywords": ["espresso machine", "home barista", "Breville Barista Express", "coffee maker", "specialty coffee"], "category": "Food & Beverage", "urgency": "medium", "budget_hint": null}<|end|>

<|system|>
You are a privacy-preserving intent extractor. Given personal device context (emails, notes, browsing), extract anonymous shopping intent keywords. Return only a JSON object with: intent (string), keywords (array), category (string), urgency (low/medium/high), budget_hint (string or null).<|end|>
<|user|>
Email: 'The baby shower is on Saturday, she registered at Buy Buy Baby. She loves minimalist style'. Calendar: 'Baby shower - Sarah - Saturday 2pm'<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "buy baby shower gift with minimalist style", "keywords": ["baby shower gift", "baby registry", "minimalist baby", "newborn gift", "baby essentials"], "category": "Baby & Kids", "urgency": "high", "budget_hint": null}<|end|>

Note: 'home office upgrade - need better chair, back hurts after long zoom calls. Budget $400-600'. Browsing: herman miller aeron review, autonomous ergochair, steelcase leap<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "buy ergonomic office chair for home office back pain relief", "keywords": ["ergonomic chair", "office chair", "Herman Miller", "standing desk chair", "lumbar support", "work from home"], "category": "Office Supplies", "urgency": "medium", "budget_hint": "$400-600"}<|end|>

{"intent": "find grain-free dog food for skin allergy", "keywords": ["grain-free dog food", "dog allergy food", "hypoallergenic pet food", "sensitive skin dog food"], "category": "Pet Supplies", "urgency": "medium", "budget_hint": null}<|end|>
